title: Saudi Arabia launches 5 rail routes to cut cargo time and costs, linking Gulf ports faster
summary_full: Saudi Arabia has launched five new rail logistics routes to accelerate cargo movement and reduce transport costs, connecting Gulf ports with key economic hubs. This initiative aims to enhance supply chain efficiency, ease highway congestion, and position the Kingdom as a vital link in global trade under Vision 2030.
